# Science & Technology

Topics in the **Science & Technology** category of *the year 2012*.

|-------|---------|
| [Higgs Boson Discovery](higgs-boson-discovery.md) | CERN announced the discovery of a new boson of about 125 GeV/c² on July 4, completing the Standard Model and confirming the Brout–Englert–Higgs mechanism by which fundamental particles acquire mass. |
| [Curiosity Rover Mars Landing](curiosity-rover-mars-landing.md) | NASA's Mars Science Laboratory rover landed in Gale Crater on August 6 via the "sky crane" maneuver, later confirming ancient Mars could have supported microbial life. |
